remainingWork: Implement trusted resolved-skill native binding independent of publish authority.
Extract and adopt one provider-neutral resolver core with cross-host parity fixtures.
Implement immutable/versioned rollout and stale-worker exclusion.
Add operator capability-failure classification, budget protection, diagnostics, metrics, and alerts.
Add the readiness-gating parent-to-resolver canary and required Temporal/Compose/restart regression coverage.
summary: Attempt 3 verifies the required architecture and operator documentation, but five concrete MM-1202 production and verification gaps remain. The complete structured findings and mandatory next-remediation input are in artifacts/jira-implement-verify.json.
